privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This Privacy Policy describes how ft_transcendence collects, uses, and protects your personal information.
privacy.s1Body: We collect: username and password (encrypted with bcrypt), profile information (display name, bio, avatar), game statistics and match history, friend relationships, and chat messages.
privacy.s2Body: Your information is used to: provide and improve the service, manage your account and authentication, enable multiplayer features and social interactions, and display leaderboards and match history.
privacy.s3Body: Passwords are stored using bcrypt hashing. Data is transmitted over secure connections. We implement appropriate technical measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access.
privacy.s4Body: Your data is retained for the duration of your account. You can immediately and completely erase all your data (profile, match history, chat, etc.) at any time via the 'Delete Account' feature in the settings screen.
privacy.s5Body:
Under GDPR, you can directly exercise the following rights within the system:
- Right to data portability: You can instantly obtain all your data in JSON format via the 'Export Data' feature in the settings screen.
- Right to erasure (right to be forgotten): All data can be completely erased from the system via the 'Delete Account' feature in the settings screen.
privacy.s6Body: For privacy-related inquiries, please contact the project administrators through the 42 school platform.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using ft_transcendence, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully before creating an account.
terms.s1Body: By creating an account or using the service, you agree to these Terms of Service and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, please do not use the service.
terms.s2Body: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials. You must not share your password or use another user's account. You must be at least 13 years old to use this service.
terms.s3Body: You agree not to: use the service for any illegal purpose, harass or abuse other users, attempt to circumvent security measures, reverse engineer or modify the service, or upload harmful content.
terms.s4Body: You retain ownership of content you submit (profile information, chat messages). By submitting content, you grant us a license to use it to operate the service. We reserve the right to remove content that violates these terms.
terms.s5Body: This service is provided as-is for educational purposes as part of the 42 school curriculum. We make no warranties about availability, accuracy, or fitness for any particular purpose.
terms.s6Body: We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the service after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms.

gdpr.title: Privacy Settings
gdpr.exportDesc: Download all your data (profile, match history, chat, etc.) in JSON format.
gdpr.deleteDesc: Deleting your account will permanently erase all your data (profile, match history, friends, chat history). This action cannot be undone.
gdpr.confirmDesc: This action cannot be undone. All your data will be permanently deleted.
